summary: Classified the two open candidates only. #51593 replaces the closed representative #47949 as the surviving Moonshot/Kimi WhatsApp-group duplicate-ID issue and stays open because the hydrated artifact does not prove that current main fixes that group-chat raw exec-ID path. #67967 is a useful but separate MiniMax Anthropic-compatible replay-policy PR; it stays open as related, with merge/fixed-by-candidate closeout blocked by failing checks and job merge restrictions.

actions.reason: Keep #51593 open as the current canonical issue for the remaining Moonshot/Kimi WhatsApp group-chat duplicate tool-call ID path; closure would lose a unique reproduction path.
Keep #67967 open as a related MiniMax subfamily candidate; it is not a duplicate of #51593 and cannot be merged or used for fixed-by closeout from this job.
